choices: A feedback loop that intensifies over-policing
items.explain: The feedback loop amplifies an existing societal inequity.

items.prompt: A system can create disparate impact even without an explicit intent to discriminate.
items.explain: Consequences can arise from biased data and decision processes regardless of stated intent.

items.prompt: Why is overall accuracy insufficient for a recidivism risk system?
choices: Accuracy cannot be calculated for classifiers
It can hide unequal false-positive and false-negative rates across groups
items.explain: Different error distributions can produce serious unequal consequences despite similar aggregate accuracy.

items.prompt: Name two business consequences of deploying a biased system.
items.rubric: Any two of fines, lawsuits, remediation cost, project cancellation, customer loss, reputational damage, or loss of market legitimacy.
items.sample_answer: Possible consequences include regulatory fines and lasting reputational damage.
